definition.description: List accounts, inspect one deterministic reference, summarize the portfolio, or return resolution candidates. Amounts are in the currency named by summary.display_currency.
definition.name: accounts

definition.description: Declare a manual balance assertion present or absent for one resolved account and date. Present requires amount and upserts app.balance_assertions; absent forbids amount, requires exact payload-bound confirmation, and hard-deletes the assertion. Repeat an unchanged target state returns mutation_nothing_to_do. Reverse a mutation with system_audit_undo(operation_id). Amounts are positions in the currency named by summary.display_currency.
definition.name: accounts_balance_assert

definition.description: Return balances by date, history, assertions, or reconciliation deltas. Resolve one account by reference; amounts are positions in summary.display_currency.
definition.name: accounts_balances

definition.description: Partial update of an account's settings. Behavioral fields: display_name, default_cost_basis_method (fifo/hifo/specific/average; invalid values raise mutation_invalid_input), include_in_net_worth, is_archived. Structural fields: official_name, last_four, account_subtype, holder_category, currency_code, credit_limit. Pass None to leave a field unchanged; include a text field's name in clear_fields to clear it (booleans are not clearable). Archiving (is_archived=True) cascades include_in_net_worth=False atomically; unarchive does NOT restore the prior include value. Writes app.account_settings; revert by calling again with the prior values (no built-in undo). Amounts are in the currency named by `summary.display_currency`.
definition.name: accounts_set

definition.description: Publish one canonical bundle or registered report to a named local or Sheets destination. This is one discrete delivery event, so retries may create another immutable local artifact. Redaction must be selected for this run; omission elicits redacted (default) versus unredacted and refuses when elicitation is unavailable. Returns receipt identity, row counts, output classes, and checksums. Writes no app.* state; recovery uses the returned artifact or Sheets receipt.

oneOf.description: One named local delivery target and its local-only options.
One named Sheets delivery target with native format semantics.
The closed canonical portability bundle.
One registered report and typed parameter binding.

definition.name: export_run

definition.description: Assert one named export destination's local or Sheets target state. state='present' upserts the typed target; state='absent' removes only MoneyBin configuration and never deletes artifacts, workbooks, or tabs. Writes app.export_destinations through its audited repository; revert with system_audit_undo(operation_id). Read readiness with system_status(sections=['exports']).

oneOf.description: Present or absent target state for one named local destination.
Present or absent target state for one named Sheets destination.

definition.name: exports_set

definition.description: Read connections or connection health.
definition.name: gsheet

definition.description: Authenticate, connect, or reconnect in one mode-aware workflow.
definition.name: gsheet_connect

definition.description: Soft-disconnect or exactly confirm a permanent purge.
definition.name: gsheet_disconnect

definition.description: Pull one or all connections.
definition.name: gsheet_pull

definition.description: Atomically accept or reject account, merchant, and security identity link decisions. Any accepted merge confirms the exact normalized full batch and complete live before-state; reject-only batches do not prompt.

oneOf.description: Accept or reject one account-link proposal.
Accept or reject one merchant-link proposal.
Accept or reject one security-link proposal.

definition.name: identity_links_decide

definition.description: Atomically consume an unchanged preview and import its file, eliciting human approval before any sign inversion.
definition.name: import_confirm

definition.description: Import one or more files.
definition.name: import_files

definition.description: Synchronize the import inbox.
definition.name: import_inbox_sync

definition.description: Set labels on one import.
definition.name: import_labels_set

definition.description: Persist an exact, expiring staged-import preview.
definition.name: import_preview

definition.description: Revert one completed import or delete one user-saved format. Import reversion permanently removes its raw rows; saved-format deletion writes app.tabular_formats, requires exact payload-bound confirmation, and is recoverable with system_audit_undo.
definition.name: import_revert

definition.description: Read import history, formats, and inbox state.
definition.name: import_status

definition.description: Return investment events, holdings, open or full tax-lot history, realized gains, or securities through one typed view. Amounts use the investment ledger sign convention and the currency in summary.display_currency.
definition.name: investments

definition.description: Select specific acquisition lots for one disposal. Writes app.lot_selections; replace the selection to revert.

disposal_txn_id.description:
investment_transaction_id of the disposal (must be
a "sell"; other event types raise mutation_invalid_input).

selections.description:
List of `{"lot_id": ..., "quantity": "..."}` dicts
(quantity as a decimal string). The selected quantities must sum
to no more than the disposal's magnitude.

definition.name: investments_lots_select

definition.description: Record investment ledger events as one validated batch. Quantity and cash signs follow the investment event convention; no revert tool.
definition.name: investments_record

definition.description: Create or update securities in app.securities by stable ID or ticker. Call again with prior values to revert.
definition.name: investments_securities_set

definition.description: Read active AI consent status or exact, cursor-paginated privacy log events. Privacy status does not accept pagination arguments.
definition.name: privacy

definition.description: Atomically grant or revoke consent for one or more feature categories. Grant is runtime non-destructive and idempotent; revoke confirms the exact normalized category set, backend, actor, profile, and live grants.
definition.name: privacy_consent_set

definition.description: Run the post-load refresh pipeline. By default it performs Google Sheets pull, matching, SQLMesh apply, deterministic categorization, and identity proposal backfill in canonical order. Pass steps to select from gsheet, match, transform, categorize, and identity. Rebuilds core.* and reports.* and may write app categorization or identity-review state. No revert path; fix inputs and rerun.

steps.description:
Subset of ``["gsheet", "match", "transform", "categorize",
"identity"]``
to run. Defaults to None (full cascade). Steps execute in
canonical order (gsheet → match → transform → categorize → identity)
regardless of input order; dependencies enforce it (categorize
reads SQLMesh-built views). Pass ``["transform"]`` to run only
SQLMesh apply.

definition.name: refresh_run

definition.description: Browse registered financial reports or run one by stable report ID. Omit `report_id` to return catalog metadata; supply it to execute a registered read-only report. This tool never accepts SQL; use `sql_query` separately for arbitrary read-only SQL.
definition.name: reports

definition.description: Return exact review counts or one normalized pending/history queue with deterministic cursor pagination.
definition.name: reviews

definition.description: Accept or reject an atomic batch of transaction, match, or auto-rule review decisions. Auto-rule decisions use kind='auto_rule' and may set allow_broad after inspecting estimated_match_count; keep auto-rule and ordinary decisions in separate calls.

oneOf.description: Accept or reject one categorization proposal.
Accept or reject one transaction-match proposal.
Accept or reject one auto-generated categorization-rule proposal.

definition.name: reviews_decide

definition.description: Execute a read-only SQL query against the database. Supports SELECT, WITH, DESCRIBE, SHOW, PRAGMA, EXPLAIN. Each output column is classified via SQL lineage; CRITICAL columns (account/routing numbers) are ALWAYS masked (****<last4>), exactly like the typed tools — raw SQL is not a privacy bypass. Amounts use the accounting convention (negative=expense, positive=income); currency is in summary.display_currency. Call sql_schema (or read resource moneybin://schema) for tables, columns, and example queries.
definition.name: sql_query

definition.description: Return the curated database schema. Default call returns a compact catalog (table names + purposes + column counts). Pass table='<schema.name>' for one table's columns/examples, or table='*' for the full ~50KB document. Mirrors the moneybin://schema resource for hosts that don't expose MCP resources.

table.description:
``None`` (default) returns the compact catalog; a full table
name like ``'core.fct_transactions'`` returns details for that
table; ``'*'`` returns the full schema document.

definition.name: sql_schema

definition.description: Disconnect one institution or clear profile-scoped sync credentials.
definition.name: sync_disconnect

definition.description: Start a hosted institution-link or nonblocking device-login session. Returned link_url and user_code values are sensitive one-time credentials; present them to the user, but never include them in logs or summaries.
definition.name: sync_link

definition.description: Pull connected financial data.
definition.name: sync_pull

definition.description: Read global health, one link session, or advance one device-login session.
definition.name: sync_status

definition.description: List recent audit events or operation history, or inspect one operation or parent audit event in detail. Detail requires exactly one identifier.
definition.name: system_audit

definition.description: Undo one complete audited operation by operation_id. The inverse mutation is itself audited and undoable; dependency conflicts return the blocking operation IDs.
definition.name: system_audit_undo

definition.description: Return selected operator status sections. Sections cover overview inventory, integrity doctor checks, categorization coverage, and export readiness. detail='full' deepens the doctor scan and includes auto-categorization health.
definition.name: system_status

definition.description: Read categories or merchant mappings with deterministic filtering and exact cursor pagination.
definition.name: taxonomy

definition.description: Atomically declare categories present, inactive, or absent and merchant mappings present or absent. The tool advertises maximum destructive risk and confirms only batches containing a resolved hard delete.

oneOf.description: Declare one category's target state.
Declare one merchant mapping's target state.

definition.name: taxonomy_set

definition.description: Query operational transactions with exact cursor pagination. Filter by resolved account or merchant, date, category, amount, or text. Amounts use the accounting convention: negative = expense, positive = income; transfers exempt. Currency is named by summary.display_currency.
definition.name: transactions

definition.description: Atomically add, edit, or delete stable-ID notes; declare complete tag and split states; or rename one tag globally. Every request is preflighted before any write; failure leaves the whole batch unchanged. Deleting notes or existing target state requires confirmation. Results retain request order and share one operation_id for audit inspection or system_audit_undo recovery.

oneOf.description: Append one independently addressable note to a transaction.
Replace the text of one note without changing its identity.
Delete one note by its stable identity.
Replace the complete tag collection on one transaction.
Replace the complete split collection on one transaction.
Rename one tag everywhere.

definition.name: transactions_annotate

definition.description: Fetch uncategorized transactions as PII-scrubbed records for LLM-assisted categorization. Merchant text (description/memo) IS sent in full — it's the categorization signal; only embedded PII (e.g. account numbers in the memo) is masked. No amounts, dates, or account IDs sent.

date_range.description: Dict with "start" and "end" keys (ISO date strings).

limit.description: Max records to return. Defaults to assist_default_batch_size (100).

definition.name: transactions_categorize_assist

definition.description: Commit a caller-reviewed categorization batch to app.transaction_categories and app.user_merchants. Re-categorize a transaction to replace a prior decision.

items.description:
List of dicts with transaction_id, category, optional
subcategory, and optional canonical_merchant_name.

definition.name: transactions_categorize_commit

definition.description: Read active, inactive, or audit-backed historical categorization rules. Use view='history' to include prior and deleted states; statistics are available from system_status(sections=['categorization']).
definition.name: transactions_categorize_rules

definition.description: Atomically declare categorization rules present, inactive, or absent. Present requires matcher, category, and priority; inactive and absent require rule_id and forbid replacement fields. The tool advertises its maximum destructive risk, but asks for exact payload-bound confirmation only before a present rule is hard-deleted. Rule removal is recoverable with system_audit_undo(operation_id).

anyOf.description: Strict matching target for one categorization rule.

definition.name: transactions_categorize_rules_set

definition.description: Run deterministic categorization engines or upgrade confident AI guesses to provider-native categories. operation='categorize' accepts methods; operation='improve_ai' forbids it. Amounts use the accounting convention: negative = expense, positive = income; transfers exempt.

methods.description:
Engines to run in the listed order. Defaults to
["rules", "merchants"]. Valid only for ``categorize``.

definition.name: transactions_categorize_run

definition.description: Create manual transactions as a validated batch. Amounts use the accounting convention: negative = expense, positive = income; transfers exempt. Reverse with system_audit_undo(operation_id).
definition.name: transactions_create
